title: ADD or REMOVE JSON  type hint Fail
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
I created a table with a JSON column. After adding data, I want to add a JSON column with type hint user_id Int64, but it fails to add successfully.
1.created a table
CREATE TABLE test_json_map4
(
v JSON(
user_group_id Int64,
module_name String,
dimensions_map Map(String, String)
)
) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
2.add data
INSERT INTO test_json_map4 (v)
select
concat('{"user_group_id":123,"module_name":"test_module","dimensions_map":{"k1":"v1","k2":"v2"}}')  as v
FROM numbers(1);
3.add JSON type hint
ALTER TABLE test_json_map4
MODIFY COLUMN v JSON(
user_group_id Int64,
module_name String,
dimensions_map Map(String, String),
user_id Int64
);
4.add JSON type hint for add index
ALTER TABLE test_json_map4
(ADD INDEX idx_user_id v.user_id TYPE minmax GRANULARITY 1);
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
1.created a table
CREATE TABLE test_json_map4
(
v JSON(
user_group_id Int64,
module_name String,
dimensions_map Map(String, String)
)
) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
2.add data
INSERT INTO test_json_map4 (v)
select
concat('{"user_group_id":123,"module_name":"test_module","dimensions_map":{"k1":"v1","k2":"v2"}}')  as v
FROM numbers(1);
3.add JSON type hint
ALTER TABLE test_json_map4
MODIFY COLUMN v JSON(
user_group_id Int64,
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json_map5 (v TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
UPDATE test_json_map5 SET v = json_insert(v, '$.extra_field', NULL);
key_bug_features: Adding JSON type hint to existing column fails
